programmes.show_description: While trying to keep a failing Australian penguin sanctuary open, a nonprofit worker loses her heart to a compassionate zoologist. (2023)
Contest winners try to solve a fake murder for a grand prize, but the event goes awry when a real murder occurs and secrets are uncovered. Cozy crime thriller. (2025)
When aspiring music producer Chloe lands her first gig working with former rising star Dustin, they race to create an epic song of the summer. (2024)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Sara travels to Hawaii for her best friend's wedding, but instead of enjoying a relaxing holiday, she finds herself helping the new manager make changes to his family hotel. (2023)
After a video of her goes viral, a mechanic finds herself falling for a charming publicist as they aim to turn her into the first female host of the world's biggest car show. (2023)
When her fiancé leaves her right before the wedding, Madeline goes to Niagara Falls for her honeymoon without him. Can she find new love alongside her adventurous side? (2024)
Busy events planner Emma doesn't have time for love, but could the charming best man at her sister's wedding convince her to give romance - and him - a second chance? (2022)
Date Whispering is the new trend in dating and Sam is the best one in LA. But when her service is called upon by her dad's life coach, will she learn the real meaning of true love? (2023)
A resort guest gets swept up in an exciting undercover investigation. But is recovering the stolen jewels worth the price of losing something even more precious: her heart? (2026)
When Tamara visits her family's apple orchard, she reconnects with her childhood best friend and together they fight - armed with pastry and passion - to keep the orchard alive. (2022)
New real estate agent Anna has a beautiful listing. The only problem: it has a ghost in residence who is convinced she cannot pass over until Anna gets back together with her ex. (2023)
40-year-old book editor Juniper is magically reconnected with an eight-year-old version of herself who questions her life choices, including the dream of writing her own stories. (2024)
Abril goes to Argentina to save her family ranch from being bought by her ex. But when the ranch is threatened, the pair must come together, rekindling their love in the process. (2025)
A single mum agrees to be the partner of a bird enthusiast for a competition but misunderstands and tells everyone she's his new girlfriend instead of just his teammate. (2025)

Teleshopping.
After her father leaves her with a treasure hunt for her inheritance, Meg teams up with a grumpy farmer to find where X marks the spot. (2023)
After growing bored with her life, Ella embarks on a soul-searching journey to Paris, navigating romance, self-discovery and cheese amid the city of love's enchanting backdrop. (2024)
When a no-nonsense consultant is tasked by her boss to make the office greener, she partners up with a rooftop florist to make their building come alive. (2024)
When aspiring music producer Chloe lands her first gig working with former rising star Dustin, they race to create an epic song of the summer. (2024)
A single mother, surprised by her daughter's recent engagement, travels to the Gulf Shores where she unexpectedly finds love. (2023)
A mutual love of Jane Austen's stories causes an overly serious scholar and an actor playing Mr Darcy to fall head over heels into their own fairy tale romance. (2024)
When the older brother of the bride catches perpetual bridesmaid Cate's eye, she must choose between fanning old flames and lighting new ones. (2021)
After having recurring dreams about a handsome stranger named Michael, Grace is shocked when she bumps into him in real life - but he has no idea who she is. (2024)
